dynamic_sources.description: Partner observation records collected from field reports and curated sightings submissions in the Pacific Northwest.
Community and stewardship sightings compiled from museum-led reporting programs across the Salish Sea.
Public biodiversity observations collected through the iNaturalist platform and filtered for relevant whale reports.
Notional ocean temperature fields and anomaly layers collected from regional satellite and modeled sea-surface products.
Notional chlorophyll concentration surfaces collected from ocean color products as a productivity proxy.
Notional salinity estimates collected from regional ocean circulation and assimilation products.
Notional surface current fields collected from ocean circulation nowcasts and forecast models.
Notional coastal wind stress and upwelling indicators collected from atmospheric and ocean forcing datasets.
Notional marine heatwave metrics collected from long-baseline sea-surface temperature analyses.
Notional marine weather variables collected from operational weather analyses and coastal station products.
Notional tidal phase and range indicators collected from regional tide prediction and gauge products.
Notional run-timing indicators collected from salmon monitoring and seasonal migration summaries.
Notional recreational and harvest effort signals collected from fishery catch-card and creel reporting programs.
Notional river flow proxies collected from hydrologic gauges to approximate salmon movement conditions.
Notional seasonal fishery timing information collected from management calendars and open-season notices.
Notional vessel activity tracks collected from Automatic Identification System broadcasts and aggregated into traffic indicators.
Notional coastal population context collected from census-style demographic summaries and settlement inventories.
Notional coastal access and attraction data collected from mapped places that may influence visitation and reporting effort.
Notional search-interest signals collected from public trends summaries as a proxy for attention and intent.

static_sources.description: Regional shoreline and coastline boundaries collected from reference geospatial layers to define the marine domain edge.
Hydrographic polygon layers collected from reference waterbody datasets to refine valid forecast water areas.
Global bathymetry grid collected from GEBCO reference products to provide persistent seafloor context.
